sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39240" key="e)pidie/rxomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιδιέρχομαι</orth>, <sense id="n39240.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pass along the line</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σύνθημα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:163" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.163</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
